chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3381 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing on Misc. No. 14885/2024 2. For hearing of main case 10.10.2025 Mr. Adil Channa Associate of Mr. Ahmed Masood, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Saima Imdad Asstt. A.G Sindh Mr. K. Jahangir, Counsel for Respondent No.5 -------------------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition as he wishes to avail the remedy before the concerned trial Court. As such the petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE MAK/PS
